headline: Stock Market Update For The Week Ahead: 'Continued Strength'
summary:
The Last Week In A Nutshell

What Happened: The S&P 500 experienced its best quarter since 1998, adding 20%.

headline: Indiana Police Chief Says Tesla Model 3 Performing Well On Patrol
summary: Bargersville, Indiana Police Chief Todd Bertram tweeted last week: "almost a year old and still beautiful only thing we have done is rear tires," showing a picture of a Tesla Model 3 parked in his driveway.
